untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order flow dominance measurement (65% threshold) and bid-ask spread widening detection (>40% above baseline), neither of which are available in the allowed indicator set. vol_ratio_20 and price_pos_20 are proxies for volume imbalance and price deviation, but cannot directly measure directional order flow or spread dynamics. Spread widening signal cannot be translated without bid-ask spread indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using vol_ratio_20 as proxy for order flow dominance and price_pos_20 for price deviation from 20-period MA. However, the core microstructure signals (dealer inventory imbalance from order flow, bid-ask spread widening) require order flow and spread data not available in the indicator library. This signal is fundamentally untranslatable without order flow and bid-ask spread indicators.
